message:
feat(build): Embed AOT compiler into edgeboxc, remove wamrc CLI

- Replace wamrc CLI subprocess with embedded WAMR AOT compiler C API
- Link libaotclib.a + libvmlib.a instead of libiwasm.a for edgeboxc
- Link LLVM directly (/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm@18 on macOS)
- Add vendor/binaryen as git submodule (replaces brew install binaryen)

No external CLIs needed for build:
- wasm-opt: uses vendored binaryen C library
- wamrc: now embedded via C API + LLVM

Binary sizes:
- edgeboxc: 2.8MB (includes LLVM + binaryen)
- edgebox: 1.1MB (runtime only)

Benchmark: fib(35) = 23.76ms (working correctly)

files.patch:
@@ -7,3 +7,6 @@
 [submodule "vendor/metal0"]
 	path = vendor/metal0
 	url = https://github.com/teamchong/metal0.git
+[submodule "vendor/binaryen"]
+	path = vendor/binaryen
+	url = https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen.git
